title: Living in Boulder blog 8 - 17 - 2017: 39.5 miles 3:38:38 Time  4,869ft

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a bike ride in the Boulder area covering 39.5 miles and 4,869 feet of climbing, describing the route through Jamestown, Poor Man road, Farmout, Wall Street, and Gold Hill. He shares observations about an old mining town that housed 300 people and operated from 1902–1905, then briefly mentions working on a book project cataloging ancient world and church father figures, and experimenting with Strava lap features on his bike computer.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Acknowledges he is not yet fit enough for these rides and needs to avoid overexerting himself
Eager to work up to all-day rides and potentially a 100-mile challenge
Finds it rewarding but strange that 30-mile rides feel hard compared to when he was super fit
Very motivated and thinks he can finish it soon by zooming through shorter fragments
